Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay Preventing Plaintiff Stacey Brown From Obtaining A Default Judgment Against Defendant Patricia Richardson And Request For Sanctions Against Intervenor General Insurance Company Of America And Its Counsels Of Record Ropers Majeski Kohn And Bentley Patricia Cogan And Blake J Russum
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel Berko, 415-771-6174 for Plaintiff/Moving party Stacey Brown.
Blake Russum, 650-364-8200 for Defendant/Opposing party Patricia Richardson.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF STACEY BROWN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay Preventing Plaintiff Stacey Brown From Obtaining A Default Judgment Against Defendant Patricia Richardson And Request For Sanctions Against Intervenor General Insurance Company Of America And Its Counsels Of Record Ropers Majeski Kohn And Bentley Patricia Cogan And Blake J Russum is DENIED. The stay remains in effect "pending resolution of the insured's defenses asserted by intervenor" per May 31, 2016 order. Both sides requests for sanctions are denied. Mr. Russum informs the Court that there is a re-notice of default in Department 514 and requests that the motion is stricken and taken off calendar. Mr. Berko states in open Court that he will take the motion of calendar. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Default Judgment Proceedings
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel Berko, (415)771-6174 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Stacey Brown.
Blake Russum, (650)780-1605 for Intervenor/Moving party General Insurance Company of America.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: INTERVENOR GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Default Judgment Proceedings is GRANTED. Default judgment proceedings are stayed pending the resolution of the insured's defenses asserted by intervenor. CCP 128; Western Heritage Insurance Company v. Sup. Ct. (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
